## Scope check

Copilot Spawner aims to stay small and readable. Before submitting, consider:

- [ ] Can this be done by a reverse proxy (auth, rate limiting, TLS)?
- [ ] Does this require a new runtime dependency?
- [ ] Does this need a database or persistent state beyond the workspace folder?

If you ticked any of those, please explain why it still belongs in core.

## Anything else
